'''''13X''''' was the name of a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] which was under the overall command of the self-styled [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]] some [[12 ABY/Legends|eight years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==History==
After the final death of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Teradoc maintained a whole flotilla of ''Victory''-class Star Destroyers under his command, all with their hulls armored with a red-colored alloy, earning them the name [[Crimson Command]]. When [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] attacked Teradoc's forces under the flag of another warlord, [[Warlord/Legends|Supreme Warlord]] [[Blitzer Harrsk|Harrsk]], Crimson Command was under the leadership of then-[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] with the ''13X'' as the flotilla's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]].

When Daala asserted full control from many of the warlords of the Deep Core, Pellaeon was given command of forty-five of the larger [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] and Crimson Command was given over to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ivan Cronus|Cronus]]. From the bridge of the ''13X'', Cronus successfully conducted a series of [[Battle of the Chardaan Shipyards|attacks]] and [[Attack on Khomm|raids]] throughout the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] before rejoining Daala's fleet at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

There, in pitched [[Assault on Yavin 4|battle]] against a New Republic fleet, a damaged Corellian gunship rammed the bridge of the ''13X'', killing Cronus and annihilating the warship.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']]
